Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $84,111,816Details
International Box Office $93,937,102
Worldwide Box Office $178,048,918
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $32,597,299
Total $32,597,299
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$547,425 (0.7% of total gross)
Legs:11.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$13,900,000 (worldwide box office is 12.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:5 opening theaters/2,089 max. theaters, 7.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $153,255,491

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 9th, 2005 (Limited) by Focus Features
June 20th, 2025 (Wide) by Focus Features (20th Anniversary)
International Releases: February 9th, 2006 (Wide) (New Zealand)
March 1st, 2006 (Wide) (South Korea)
February 9th, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
February 12th, 2026 (Limited), released as Brokeback Mountain (20th Anniversary) (Re-release) (Netherlands)
Video Release: April 4th, 2006 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sexuality, nudity, language and some violence.
Running Time: 134 minutes
Award nomination: 2006 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: BAFTA Best Film Winner, Directors Guild of America Outstanding Directorial Achievement in Theatrical Feature Film Winner, Golden Globe Winner Best Picture—Drama, Producers Guild of America Best Theatrical Motion Picture Winner, Writers Guild of America Best Adapted Screenplay Winner
Plot point: Cowboys, Cowboys in Modern Times, Forbidden Romance, LGBTQ+, Romance
Social setting: Life on a Farm
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: River Road Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
